Subject: Pricing tiers for Example Co.

Hi there,

Thanks for considering Example Co. as you get your shipping set up. We have three tiers: Starter (up to 100 shipments/month, core carrier integrations, email support), Growth (up to 1,000 shipments/month, rate shopping, batch label printing, and chat support), and Scale (unlimited shipments, API access, dedicated account manager). In the meantime, let us know roughly how many shipments you expect to send monthly. That'll help us point you toward the right fit from the start.

Best,
The Example Co. Team

Subject: What sets us apart

Thanks for giving us a shot at earning your business, comparing options carefully is the right move for a decision like this.

Here's what tends to stand out to customers who've evaluated other platforms alongside ours: faster implementation (most teams are up and running in under two weeks), a support team that responds in hours rather than days, and pricing that stays flat as you scale rather than jumping at usage tiers. We also don't lock core features behind higher-priced plans, so what you sign up for is what you get.

If you can share which providers you're weighing us against, we can point you to the specific differences that'll matter most for your use case.

Best,
The Example Co. Team
